title: Embrace long-running tasks with Opus 4.8 and Claude Code
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 is a new model that supports long-running autonomous coding tasks through features like /goal and /remote-control commands. Users can hand off complex coding work to Claude Code and let it complete tasks without constant oversight.
